rules: Absolutely no Inter, Roboto, or standard sans for headings. Use JetBrains Mono for a pure developer tool aesthetic.
Code areas and file tree must use JetBrains Mono.
Overlines, tiny labels, and badges must be uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-widest).
Do not use default Vercel or Stripe aesthetics.
No purple or teal for CTAs.
Gradients are forbidden in the workspace; use solid colors and 1px crisp borders.
Tinted greys must be zinc (slight cool undertone).

layout.spacing_scale: Use p-2, p-4 for the workspace density. Use generous p-8, p-12 for the Login and Dashboard cards.
layout.workspace_grid: Flexbox or CSS Grid creating a full height viewport calc(100vh - 56px). 3 columns: Left Sidebar (w-1/4, min-w-[250px]), Center Pane (flex-1), Right Sidebar (w-1/5, min-w-[200px]).
layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-collapse style with 1px solid border-zinc-800 between columns and panels.

login_screen.style: High-impact Glassmorphism card overlaying the abstract background. Backdrop blur xl, bg-black/60, 1px border-white/10.
login_screen.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: sharp corners (rounded-sm), text-white, border-zinc-700, focus ring is vibrant orange.
login_screen.cta: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-sm w-full py-2 font-mono uppercase tracking-wide

project_dashboard.style: Bento-style or neat grid. Flat cards with 1px border-zinc-800, no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) with a vibrant orange border.
project_dashboard.new_project_btn: Distinctive button with + icon, maybe dashed border or solid orange depending on hierarchy.

workspace_header.container: h-14 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 flex items-center justify-between px-4 z-10
workspace_header.address_bar: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-sm text-zinc-400 px-4 py-1.5 rounded w-[400px] text-center font-mono focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-orange-500
workspace_header.run_btn: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/20 px-4 py-1.5 rounded hover:bg-emerald-500/20 font-mono text-sm transition-colors

chat_panel_left.container: h-full border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col
chat_panel_left.user_message: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 p-3 rounded-md ml-8 text-sm
chat_panel_left.ai_message: border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 p-3 rounded-md mr-8 text-sm relative
chat_panel_left.ai_trigger: text-yellow-500 bg-yellow-500/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm font-mono text-xs

code_editor_center.tabs_bar: flex border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden
code_editor_center.tab: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-mono border-r border-zinc-800 flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer
code_editor_center.gutter: text-right pr-4 text-zinc-600 font-mono w-12 border-r border-zinc-800/50 pt-4 text-sm

file_tree_right.container: h-full border-l border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 p-4 overflow-y-auto
file_tree_right.file_item: flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-zinc-400 font-mono py-1 px-2 rounded-sm cursor-pointer hover:bg-zinc-800/50 hover:text-zinc-200

collaborators_panel.style: Floating panel anchored top-right. bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl rounded-md p-4 w-72 mt-2
collaborators_panel.member_item: flex items-center gap-3 py-2 border-b border-zinc-800/50 last:border-0
collaborators_panel.avatar: w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-zinc-700 object-cover

motion.panels: Use minimal layout animations. Avoid heavy bouncy springs in IDE; prioritize functional speed.

login_background.description: Abstract dark geometric pattern for the authentication screen background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over surface maintains > 4.5:1 ratio. Utilize zinc-400 for secondary info, zinc-50 for primary.
accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must implement focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500
accessibility.test_ids: Mandatory data-testid attributes for all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='login-submit', data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='run-button', data-testid='file-tree-item')

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI in React using JS. Provide raw Tailwind strings.
The workspace should NOT be responsive on mobile. It is a desktop-first IDE layout. Enforce min-widths.
Strictly place File Tree on the RIGHT, and Chat on the LEFT, as explicitly requested by the user.
Utilize the images explicitly declared under the 'assets' key. DO NOT use placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
